argv:
bash -c $'set -euo pipefail
count=0
while IFS= read -r path; do
  [[ -z "$path" ]] && continue
  jq empty "$path"
  count=$((count + 1))
done < <(git diff --name-only 7dc67e9aef08ca4928159d7d13db6fdbd40c5d4c -- "*.json")
printf "changed_json_files_parsed=%s\n" "$count"'

Production contract 为 3 Skills、10 profiles、11 exits、3 authoring-seed edges。

argv:
bash -c $'set -euo pipefail
changed=$(git diff --name-only 7dc67e9aef08ca4928159d7d13db6fdbd40c5d4c --)
for pattern in "^\.github/" "(^|/)Dockerfile" "(^|/)docker-compose" "(^|/)(k8s|kustomize|helm|charts)/" "(^|/)(db|database)/migrations/|(^|/)migrations/.*\.sql$" "(^|/)Makefile$"; do
  if printf "%s\n" "$changed" | rg -q "$pattern"; then exit 1; fi
done
printf "ci_cd=0 container=0 k8s_helm=0 db_migration=0 makefile=0 skill_contract_migration_manifests=2\n"'
commands.summary: 独立 checker 执行并通过：deployment-path-classification

argv:
bash -c $'set -euo pipefail
paths=$(git diff --name-only 7dc67e9aef08ca4928159d7d13db6fdbd40c5d4c -- | rg "(^|/)(\.github|Dockerfile|docker-compose|k8s|kustomize|helm|charts|migrations|terraform|Makefile)(/|$|\.)" || true)
if [[ -n "$paths" ]]; then
  printf "%s\n" "$paths"
else
  printf "ci_cd_container_k8s_migration_makefile_paths=0\n"
fi'

Upstream ownership tests 6/6 通过。

argv:
bash -c $'set -euo pipefail
count=0
while IFS= read -r skill; do
  for root in .trellis/guru-team/skills/packages .agents/skills .codex/skills .cursor/skills .claude/skills; do
    diff -qr -x __pycache__ -x "*.pyc" "trellis/skills/guru-team/packages/$skill" "$root/$skill" >/dev/null
    count=$((count + 1))
  done
done < <(jq -r ".skills[] | select(.state == \"active\") | .id" trellis/skills/guru-team/registry.json)
cmp trellis/skills/guru-team/adapters/eval/native_adapter.py .trellis/guru-team/skills/adapters/eval/native_adapter.py
printf "package_tree_comparisons=%s adapter_bytes=equal\n" "$count"'
commands.summary: 45 组 package tree 与 native adapter bytes 一致。

独立 checker 执行并通过：py-compile
Shared runtime tests 557 passed、13 conditional skips。

argv:
bash -c $'set -euo pipefail
if git diff --name-only 7dc67e9aef08ca4928159d7d13db6fdbd40c5d4c -- | rg -qi "(^|/)(\.env($|\.)|id_rsa|id_ed25519|.*\.(pem|p12|pfx|key)$)"; then
  echo "secret-like filename detected"
  exit 1
fi
if git diff --no-ext-diff 7dc67e9aef08ca4928159d7d13db6fdbd40c5d4c -- | rg -q "AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|gh[pousr]_[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}|-----BEGIN (RSA |OPENSSH |EC |DSA |PGP )?PRIVATE KEY-----"; then
  echo "secret-like content detected"
  exit 1
fi
printf "secret_like_filenames=0 secret_like_content=0\n"'

adequacy_dimensions.summary: R1-R17、AC1-AC22、GitHub authority 与 issue close/related 范围完整一致。
Minimal public handoff、routing-only clarification、native owner staging 与 task-local freshness 设计均被实现。
P2-F002、R17 与 R16 normal-path correction 在 canonical、installed 和平台副本中一致，无开放实现缺陷。
Package 166、runtime 557/13 skip、preset 45、ownership 6、Stage0 24 与 production 12 均通过。
ssot_first 的 15/15 durable paths 与 task delta 已合并，task-history-only 内容未泄入长期合同。
Workflow、package interface、registry、adapter、runtime、schema、eval 与 tests 的跨层投影一致。
Stage0 manifest 与 #147 eval schema/runner/grader/protocol 保持冻结，source/installed 与全平台 bytes 一致。
无 CI/CD、container、K8s/Helm、DB migration 或 Makefile 影响；安装/update/reapply 与 zero-sidecar 门禁通过。
实现与 Phase 2 checker 的失败、恢复、补充 handoff 与 completed 链均闭合，只有 completed evidence 进入本轮。
当前 round 58 项命令与所有适用 repository gate 已记录；exact remote branch proof 是 push 后 PR readiness 的 non-blocking limitation。
